title: Cost categories on invoices
summaryBody:
Delayed as LinkMyBooks pulled out. Looking to see if another integrator else might be interested.
Potential Practice Experience project - undecided if it’s going ahead nor the size. But it’s earmarked for some time between Jan-Apr. Should be a small change for us i.e. new data field on invoice line items.
